THE PRIOR ORDER POSTPONING THE NON-JUDICIAL FORECLOSURE IS NO LONGER IN EFFECT. THE COURT FINDS THAT PLAINTIFF IS NOT CREDIBLE AND THE RECORD DEMONSTRATES THAT PLAINTIFF/ BORROWER AND DEFENDANT/LENDER HAD COMMUNICATIONS REGARDING THE LOAN AT LEAST 30 DAYS PRIOR TO THE RECORDATION OF THE NOTICE OF DEFAULT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-01-2011 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-07-2011 Continued To Dec-16-11 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

Order To Show Cause Re: Postponement - Per Ex Parte Order Filed 08-17-11. (302)
Off Calendar Oct-12-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFFS MARIMILA FLORES, ADAN M. FLORES AND VICTOR HERNANDEZ ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: POSTPONEMENT.

APPEARANCES: Nick Pacheco, Esq. of Nick Pacheco Law Group 888/888-8641 for pltfs & moving parties; Nicholas B. Waranoff, Esq. of Allen Matkins Leck Gamble Mallory & Natsis LLP 273-7483 for defts & opposing parties.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - Order to Show Cause Regarding the Postponement of Non-Judicial Foreclosure is discharged. The prior order postponing the non-judicial foreclosure is no longer in effect.. The court finds that plaintiff is not credible and the record demonstrates that plaintiff/ borrower and defendant/lender had communications regarding the loan at least 30 days prior to the recordation of the notice of default. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

Amended Notice And Motion To Postpone Non-Judicial Foreclosure
Off Calendar Oct-12-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF MARIMILA FLORES, ADAN FLORES AND VICTOR HERNANDEZ AMENDED MOTION TO POSTPONE NON-JUDICIAL FORECLOSURE.

APPEARANCES: Nick Pacheco, Esq. of Nick Pacheco Law Group 888/888-8641 for pltfs & moving parties; Nicholas B. Waranoff, Esq. of Allen Matkins Leck Gamble Mallory & Natsis LLP 273-7483 for defts & opposing parties.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - Order to Show Cause Regarding the Postponement of Non-Judicial Foreclosure is discharged. The prior order postponing the non-judicial foreclosure is no longer in effect.. The court finds that plaintiff is not credible and the record demonstrates that plaintiff/ borrower and defendant/lender had communications regarding the loan at least 30 days prior to the recordation of the notice of default. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

Order To Show Cause Re: Postponement - Per Ex Parte Order Filed 08-17-11. (302)

APPEARANCES: Cathy A. Hongola, Esq. of Allen Matkins Leck Gamble Mallory & Natsis LLP 273-7470 for deft OneWest Bank; no other appearances.
